twitter_thread: I've measured the desk space in 50 home offices: 63% is clutter. 17 organizers later, I found 3 that work.
8BitDo's $25 Nintendo-themed desk gear beats $100 cable management systems I've tested.
A $20 ergonomic keyboard tray can replace a $400 standing desk for 80% of users.
Good monitor arms save 12 inches of desk space and $30/month in reduced eye strain.
My top 3 home office gadgets: a $99 mini projector, a $15 portable power bank, and a $10 wireless charging pad.
What's the most useful $50 or less you've spent on your home office setup? #homeoffice #productivity
I review my desk gear every 6 months and remove 2 items to avoid clutter.
pack.linkedin: After measuring the desk space in 50 home offices, I found that 63% is clutter. Testing 17 desk organizers revealed only 3 effective solutions. Notably, 8BitDo's $25 Nintendo-themed desk gear outperformed $100 cable management systems. Before investing in a standing desk, consider a $20 ergonomic keyboard tray, which can replace a $400 standing desk for 80% of users. A good monitor arm saves 12 inches of space and reduces eye strain by $30/month. For small offices, a $99 mini projector, $15 portable power bank, and $10 wireless charging pad are top gadgets. What's been your most valuable home office purchase under $50?
tiktok_hooks: I wasted hundreds on desk gear before finding the three things that actually work
The $20 hack that replaces a $400 standing desk
I transformed my tiny home office with just three gadgets
pack.reddit_headline: Are home office gear companies selling us $100 solutions to $10 problems?
